probe_method: 6-swap sequence: Qwen (warm) -> Llama -> Nemotron -> Qwen -> Llama -> Qwen. Minimal prompt ('Say OK'), num_predict=10. Measure wall clock per swap.
evidence_summary: All model swaps complete under 6 seconds. Qwen (6.6GB) takes 4-6s to load. Smaller models (Llama 2GB, Nemotron 2.7GB) load in 1-2s. No swap exceeded 10s threshold. Pattern is size-proportional and predictable.
note: Qwen empty responses on minimal prompts due to thinking-mode token budget consumption. Swap latency measurement is valid regardless (measures load + first-token time).
